title: philadelphus delavayi var. delavayi
intro: Philadelphus delavayi var. delavayi, also known as the Chinese mock orange, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the family Hydrangeaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Philadelphus delavayi var. delavayi include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Philadelphus delavayi var. delavayi is often used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
